full_text:
Cui Yan (Jigui) 崔琰 (季珪)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Yan (崔琰), styledJigui (季珪), was born in Qinghe. Scholar who served Yuan Shao then Cao Cao, who executed him for his opposition. Cui Yan was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Cui Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
